---
title: "Candy's Comedy"
format:
  html:
    title-block: false
---

::: {.hero-meme}
<div class="hero-inner">
<div class="hero-text">
<h1 class="title-3d">Candy's Comedy</h1>
<p class="hero-tagline">Standup comedian in Baltimore</p>
</div>
</div>
:::

::: {#about .about-light}
## About

<div class="about-top">

<div class="about-portrait">
```{r profile, echo=FALSE, fig.align="center", out.width="280px", fig.alt="Portrait of Candy, standup comedian, smiling at the camera."}
knitr::include_graphics("resources/images/profile.png")
```
</div>

<div class="about-bio">

Candy is a standup comedian based in Baltimore whose work is personal, random, and always a little unhinged. She's performed everywhere from open mics to funerals and her therapy appointments — and whether you're 4 or 40, she'll find a way to make you laugh. Her humor tackles parenting chaos, marriage, and growing up in the Midwest, all delivered with the unearned confidence of a dorky mom who has absolutely no business being this enthusiastic about it.

## Reviews

"Her therapy appointments always make me laugh" -- Candy's therapist 

"Out of my two kids, she's definitely top two" - Candy's Mom 

Find her online as **@candys_comedy**. She posts something new everyday, often featuring her dog, Eevee. 

<p class="connect-lead">Shows, collabs, or cat videos—say hi.</p>

<p><a class="email-link" href="mailto:candyscomedybaltimore@gmail.com">candyscomedybaltimore@gmail.com</a></p>

<div class="social-row">
<a class="social-btn social-yt" href="https://www.youtube.com/@candys_comedy" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">YouTube</a>
<a class="social-btn social-ig" href="https://www.instagram.com/candys_comedy/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Instagram</a>
<a class="social-btn social-fb" href="https://www.facebook.com/candyscomedy" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Facebook</a>
<a class="social-btn social-tt" href="https://www.tiktok.com/@candys_comedy" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">TikTok</a>
</div>


</div>

</div>

:::

::: {#social .social-feed-section}
## Watch & Follow

```{=html}
<style>
  .tab-buttons {
    display: flex;
    gap: 0.75rem;
    justify-content: center;
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  }

  .tab-btn {
    padding: 0.5rem 1.5rem;
    border: 2px solid currentColor;
    background: transparent;
    border-radius: 999px;
    font-size: 0.95rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: background 0.2s, color 0.2s;
  }

  .tab-btn.active-tt {
    background: #000;
    color: #fff;
    border-color: #000;
  }

  .tab-btn.active-yt {
    background: #ff0000;
    color: #fff;
    border-color: #ff0000;
  }

  .tab-btn:not(.active-tt):not(.active-yt) {
    color: #555;
    border-color: #ccc;
  }

  .tab-btn:not(.active-tt):not(.active-yt):hover {
    background: #f5f5f5;
  }

  .tab-panel {
    display: none;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: flex-start;
  }

  .tab-panel.active {
    display: flex;
  }

  .yt-embed-wrapper {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 760px;
    aspect-ratio: 16 / 9;
  }

  .yt-embed-wrapper iframe {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 12px;
  }

  .tt-embed-wrapper {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
  }
</style>

<div class="tab-buttons">
  <button class="tab-btn active-tt" onclick="showTab('tiktok', this)">🎵 TikTok</button>
  <button class="tab-btn" onclick="showTab('youtube', this)">▶ YouTube</button>
</div>

<div id="tab-tiktok" class="tab-panel active">
  <div class="tt-embed-wrapper">
    <blockquote
      class="tiktok-embed"
      cite="https://www.tiktok.com/@candys_comedy/video/7631940206890913037"
      data-video-id="7631940206890913037"
      style="max-width: 605px; min-width: 325px;">
      <section>
        <a target="_blank" href="https://www.tiktok.com/@candys_comedy">@candys_comedy</a>
      </section>
    </blockquote>
    <script async src="https://www.tiktok.com/embed.js"></script>
  </div>
</div>

<div id="tab-youtube" class="tab-panel">
  <div class="yt-embed-wrapper">
    <iframe
      src="https://www.youtube.com/embed?listType=user_uploads&list=candys_comedy&rel=0"
      title="Candy's Comedy YouTube channel"
      allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture"
      allowfullscreen>
    </iframe>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
  function showTab(tab, btn) {
    document.querySelectorAll('.tab-panel').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
    document.querySelectorAll('.tab-btn').forEach(b => {
      b.classList.remove('active-tt', 'active-yt');
    });

    document.getElementById('tab-' + tab).classList.add('active');

    if (tab === 'tiktok') btn.classList.add('active-tt');
    if (tab === 'youtube') btn.classList.add('active-yt');
  }
</script>
```

:::
